ResearchProjectDef.label: storm ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual to try to invoke a rainstorm.

ResearchProjectDef.label: severing ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual that temporarily severs the psychic connection of all humans and humanlike creatures in the area, making them psychically deaf.

ResearchProjectDef.label: fever ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual that induces a psychic fever in the targets. The fever rapidly helps rapidly cure disease, but requires frequent medical tending or the target will die.

ResearchProjectDef.label: regrowth ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual that regrows missing body parts and heals permanent injuries.

ResearchProjectDef.label: beckoning ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual that induces distant traders to visit the colony.

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced beckoning
ResearchProjectDef.description: Improve the beckoning ritual, to make the invoker able to select what kind of trader receives the call.

ResearchProjectDef.label: eruption ritual
ResearchProjectDef.description: Perform a psychic ritual to pull valuable minerals to the surface from deep underground.

ResearchProjectDef.label: advanced eruption
ResearchProjectDef.description: Improve the eruption ritual, to make the invoker able to select what kind of mineral to pull to the surface.
